data.description: Oportun will speak at Sidoti Investor Conference in March, an online event with potential investors.

data.title: Firefly Aerospace to Announce Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results on March 19, 2026
data.description: In Cedar Park, Texas, on March 12, 2026, Firefly Aerospace, a prominent space and defense technology firm trading on Nasdaq under the symbol FLY, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025, concluding on December 31, 2025. The announcement specified that the report will be made public on Thursday, March 19, 2026, after the close of the market.

data.title: ServBanc Holdco, Inc. Completes Acquisition of IF Bancorp, Inc.
data.description: ServBanc Holdco, Inc., based in Oswego, Illinois, announced on March 12, 2026, that they are the holding company for Servbank, National Association, and IF Bancorp, Inc. IF Bancorp, traded on NASDAQ under the symbol IROQ, is the holding company for Iroquois Federal Savings and Loan Association.

data.title: WIRobotics Selected for the Physical AI Fellowship Powered by AWS, NVIDIA, and MassRobotics
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, on March 12, 2026, WIRobotics shared that they were chosen for the second group of the Physical AI Fellowship. This program, facilitated by AWS Startups and NVIDIA Inception, is virtual and designed to support promising robotics startups in their growth.

data.title: Lockheed Martin Skunk Works' DARKSTAR Revisited: The Untold Secrets! at The Palm Springs Air Museum
data.description: In Palm Springs, California on March 12, 2026, it was announced that there is high demand among visitors to see the DARKSTAR, manufactured by Lockheed Martin Skunk Works for a major motion picture. As a result, a special lecture and reception has been scheduled for Saturday, April 4, 2026, at 6 PM. Brian Herschberger will be one of the speakers at the event.

data.title: Adobe Stock Falls Despite Better-Than-Expected Report As CEO Steps Down
data.description: Adobe, a leading digital media and marketing software company, surpassed expectations for its fiscal Q1 results and outlook. However, despite the positive performance, Adobe's stock experienced a decline due to the announcement of a CEO transition. The company's stock drop was notable, signaling investor concern despite the strong financial numbers reported.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P 500 Give Up Gains; Micron Has A Good Day (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the stock market saw a decline as the Dow Jones index dropped following a decrease in oil prices. Applied Materials also made headlines with a new partnership announcement. The Dow and S&P 500 both experienced losses, while Micron had a positive day. This news was reported live on Investor's Business Daily. Overall, this signals a shift in the market as investors react to fluctuating oil prices and company developments.

data.title: Record Auction Sales at The Amelia Concours; Duesenberg and McLaren Awarded Best of Show
data.description: In Traverse City, Michigan, the 31st Amelia Concours event took place from March 5 to March 8, 2026. The celebration featured curated displays of top-notch automobiles, luxurious hospitality, informative seminars, and engaging driving experiences for enthusiasts.

data.title: Logista Fund and Andrew Serotta Support Successful Texas Tour Charity Ride
data.description: In Houston on March 12, 2026, Logista Advisors and its Chief Investment Officer, Andrew Serotta, took the lead as sponsors of the Texas Tour. This charity event involved a multi-day endurance cycling initiative that aimed to support various causes throughout Texas. The initiative successfully brought together a group of cyclists who participated in the event.

data.title: Notice of Data Incident - Community Nurse on behalf of Doctor Alliance
data.description: In Boston on March 12, 2026, Doctor Alliance encountered a data security incident potentially impacting the privacy of certain individuals' data. Community Nurse, on behalf of Doctor Alliance, has informed individuals at risk and provided support services to assist them.

data.title: Trader loses almost $50M in Aave trade; Protocol offers $600K refund for $50M USDT trade yielding 324 AAVE tokens.
data.description: A user recently completed a $50 million USDT trade using Aave’s interface, but only received 324 AAVE tokens in return. The transaction proceeded despite a warning about high slippage.

data.title: Coleridge Awarded $4.3 Million Grant from Ascendium Education Group to Strengthen Cross-State Education-to-Workforce Data Infrastructure
data.description: A $4.3 million grant has been awarded to Coleridge for a four-year initiative to integrate postsecondary and workforce data across states. The goal is to improve transitions and advance economic mobility. The initiative, announced in Washington on March 12, 2026, is funded by Ascendium Education.

data.title: Senate leader predicts market structure won't pass before April. SAVE America Act takes priority before vote on crypto bills.
data.description: Senator John Thune has indicated that the chamber will focus on advancing the SAVE America Act before moving on to consider bipartisan legislation related to the crypto market structure. This decision highlights the Senate's intentions to prioritize certain legislation, with the SAVE America Act taking precedence. The move suggests that the chamber will first address the SAVE America Act before turning its attention to voting on bipartisan bills concerning the regulation and oversight of the crypto market. By emphasizing the SAVE America Act, Senator Thune suggests that this particular legislation holds greater importance at this time.
